steps.title: Find the key signal in the question
steps.content: The question asks which choice emphasizes how long Mayumi Narita competed. The critical information is the time span: 1996 to 2004. To emphasize duration, the choice must present both the start and end of her career, framing it as a complete period of time.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly states “competed as a swimmer from 1996 to 2004,” explicitly showing the full span of her career and emphasizing its length. Choice A focuses on medal count (twenty medals, fifteen gold), choice B shifts focus to swimming's history since 1960, and choice D mentions only her debut year without showing when her career ended. This matches choice C — C is correct.
